title: Red Lobster's Ultimate Endless Shrimp promotion described as a 'car crash' for the company, lawsuit says
title_zh: 诉讼称，红龙虾的终极无尽虾促销活动被描述为该公司的“车祸”
text: "Thai Union doubled down on a campaign to squeeze out every drop of value that it could," creditors said
zh: 债权人表示，“泰国联合银行加倍努力，竭尽全力榨取每一滴价值”

title: Volkswagen plans to cut 15% of its workforce and close four German plants, report says
title_zh: 报道称，大众汽车计划裁员 15%，并关闭四家德国工厂
text: Auto giant Volkswagen is reportedly planning to cut 100,000 jobs and end production at four German plants over the coming years.
zh: 据报道，汽车巨头大众汽车计划在未来几年内裁员 10 万人，并结束四家德国工厂的生产。

title: 'The cult of Elon': SpaceX investors grapple with volatility amid big swings
title_zh: “埃隆崇拜”：SpaceX 投资者在大幅波动中应对波动
text: SpaceX stock has seen big spikes and drop in its opening two weeks as a public company.
zh: 作为上市公司，SpaceX 的股价在上市两周内经历了大幅上涨和下跌。

title: Global recession is inevitable if Strait of Hormuz stays shut, says Citadel's Ken Griffin
title_zh: Citadel 的 Ken Griffin 表示，如果霍尔木兹海峡继续关闭，全球经济衰退将不可避免
text: A prolonged blockage of the Strait of Hormuz for the next six to 12 months will mean an unavoidable recession, the billionaire investor said.
zh: 这位亿万富翁投资者表示，未来 6 到 12 个月霍尔木兹海峡的长期封锁将意味着不可避免的经济衰退。

zh: 这一决定标志着特朗普政府与人工智能公司之间的谈判向前迈出了重要一步。

title: China's Zhipu is closing in on top U.S. AI models with Anthropic and OpenAI held back

text: Zhipu's GLM 5.2 shows the AI fight is shifting to who delivers the most intelligence per dollar, making open source suddenly a real contender.
zh: 智普的 GLM 5.2 表明，人工智能之争正在转向谁能以每美元提供最多的智能，这使得开源突然成为真正的竞争者。

title: Tesla and Waymo duel in the robotaxi race — but the company spending the most builds no cars at all
title_zh: 特斯拉和 Waymo 在机器人出租车竞赛中展开对决——但花费最多的公司根本不生产汽车
text: Uber is quietly writing $500 million checks to lock in robotaxis as Waymo threatens to leave it behind.
zh: Uber 正在悄悄开出 5 亿美元的支票来锁定机器人出租车，而 Waymo 则威胁要放弃它。

title: ServiceNow, Salesforce and other software stocks surge as the OpenAI threat weakens

zh: 甲骨文的股票错过了更广泛的软件上涨，因为该公司通过其云基础设施业务与 OpenAI 的成功息息相关。

title: U.S. strikes Iran after Trump accuses Tehran of ceasefire violation in Strait of Hormuz
title_zh: 特朗普指责德黑兰违反霍尔木兹海峡停火协议后，美国对伊朗进行打击
text: The attack comes as the United States and Iran are supposed to be engaging in a 60-period of no hostilities as they hold talks to end their war.
zh: 这次袭击发生之际，美国和伊朗本应在 60 年内没有敌对行动，并举行会谈以结束战争。

title: Oracle stock has worst week since 2001 dot-com bust as AI financing concerns escalate
title_zh: 随着人工智能融资担忧升级，甲骨文股价遭遇 2001 年互联网泡沫破灭以来最糟糕的一周
text: Oracle's surging spending, negative free cash flow and $130 billion debt pile are weighing on the stock.
zh: 甲骨文激增的支出、负自由现金流和 1,300 亿美元的债务正在给该股带来压力。

title: Rubio says Israel, Lebanon reach framework agreement aimed at 'lasting peace and security'
title_zh: 卢比奥表示以色列和黎巴嫩达成旨在“持久和平与安全”的框架协议
text: Israel and Lebanon agreed to implement a ceasefire. But that is contingent on the paramilitary group Hezbollah agreeing to halt hostilities.
zh: 以色列和黎巴嫩同意实施停火。但这取决于准军事组织真主党同意停止敌对行动。

title: Walmart heir Lukas Walton buys minority stake in the Chicago Bulls and United Center
title_zh: 沃尔玛继承人卢卡斯·沃尔顿购买芝加哥公牛队和联合中心球馆的少数股权
text: Lukas Walton is the 39-year-old grandson of Walmart founder Sam Walton. He and Samantha Walton are residents of Chicago.
zh: 卢卡斯·沃尔顿 (Lukas Walton) 39 岁，是沃尔玛创始人山姆·沃尔顿 (Sam Walton) 的孙子。他和萨曼莎·沃尔顿是芝加哥居民。

title: SpaceX’s new bonds are flashing a warning sign, as investors pump the brakes on AI frenzy
title_zh: 随着投资者对人工智能狂热踩刹车，SpaceX 的新债券发出了警告信号
text: Elon Musk’s company made a splash earlier this week with a $25 billion bond deal, less than two weeks after it raised tens of billions of dollars in cash.
zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的公司本周早些时候以 250 亿美元的债券交易引起轰动，距离筹集数百亿美元现金不到两周。

title: Iran’s ship attack tests the shipping-insurance market just as war-risk premiums had plunged
title_zh: 战争险保费暴跌之际，伊朗船舶袭击事件考验航运保险市场
text: War-risk premiums narrowed considerably in recent days but could increase again.
zh: 最近几天，战争险保费大幅收窄，但可能会再次上升。

title: Fed’s Kashkari projects one interest-rate hike this year. Here’s what changed his mind.
title_zh: 美联储卡什卡里预计今年将加息一次。这就是改变他想法的原因。
text: Doubts over the U.S.-Iran peace deal and the AI buildup mean a rate hike is possible, the Minneapolis Fed president says.
zh: 明尼阿波利斯联储主席表示，对美伊和平协议和人工智能建设的疑虑意味着加息是可能的。

title: After losing my son, would it be a mistake to sell my recently purchased house and move to my hometown?
title_zh: 失去儿子后，卖掉新买的房子搬到老家会不会是一个错误？
text: “I raised my children there as a single mother, and it was the last home my son lived in before he passed away unexpectedly.”
zh: “我作为一个单身母亲在那里抚养了我的孩子，这是我儿子意外去世之前住的最后一个家。”

title: Why getting dumped from the Dow is the ultimate buy signal for this — or any — stock
title_zh: 为什么道指被抛售是这只股票或任何股票的最终买入信号
text: The “Dow curse” now favors Verizon over Alphabet.
zh: “道琼斯指数诅咒”现在有利于 Verizon，而不是 Alphabet。

title: ‘I’ll happily wait’: Does delaying Social Security make sense for high earners like me?
title_zh: “我会很乐意等待”：延迟社会保障对于像我这样的高收入者有意义吗？
text: “In many states, Social Security benefits are exempt from state income tax.”
zh: “在许多州，社会保障福利免征州所得税。”

title: The World Cup has made Cape Verde goalkeeper Vozinha a $17 million social-media star

text: As Cape Verde faces off against Saudi Arabia tonight, here’s a look at what could be next for the breakout World Cup star.
zh: 佛得角今晚将迎战沙特阿拉伯，让我们来看看这位世界杯新星的下一步可能会发生什么。

title_zh: 马年的中国：稳健的小跑还是轻快的驰骋？ - 摩根大通私人银行
text: China in the Year of the Horse: A stable trot or a brisk gallop? J.P. Morgan Private Bank
zh: 马年的中国：稳健的小跑还是轻快的驰骋？摩根大通私人银行

title: China’s Market Revival Hinges on Gloomy Economy Turning Corner - Bloomberg.com
title_zh: 中国市场复苏取决于低迷经济的拐点 - Bloomberg.com
text: China’s Market Revival Hinges on Gloomy Economy Turning Corner Bloomberg.com
zh: 中国市场复苏取决于低迷经济的拐点 Bloomberg.com

title: Commentary: What China’s underperforming tech stocks say about its real economy - CNA
title_zh: 评论：中国表现不佳的科技股对其实体经济有何影响 - CNA
text: Commentary: What China’s underperforming tech stocks say about its real economy CNA
zh: 评论：中国表现不佳的科技股对其实体经济有何影响 CNA

title: Gavin Newsom calls for national billionaires tax: 'It's time for an economic reset'
title_zh: 加文·纽瑟姆呼吁征收全国亿万富翁税：“是时候进行经济重置了”
text: California Gov. Gavin Newsom said he supports imposing "a true minimum tax on billionaires" and closing "tax-free lifestyle loan" loopholes for the rich.
zh: 加州州长加文·纽瑟姆表示，他支持“对亿万富翁征收真正的最低税”，并堵住富人的“免税生活方式贷款”漏洞。

title: Healthcare stocks have caught fire, sending all 3 of our names to record highs
title_zh: 医疗保健股火了，我们的三个名字都创下了历史新高
text: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.
zh: 每个工作日，投资俱乐部都会发布最后冲刺；下午交易最后一小时的可行更新。

title: Treasury Secretary Bessent backs rate cuts but says he understands if the Fed wants to wait
title_zh: 财政部长贝森特支持降息，但表示他理解美联储是否愿意等待
text: Bessent has previously said the Fed should hasten cutting interest rates, calling reductions "the only ingredient missing" for stronger economic growth.
zh: 贝森特此前曾表示，美联储应加快降息，称降息是经济增长强劲的“唯一缺失的因素”。

title: Warren Buffett says he sold Apple too soon and would buy more of it, though not in this market
title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特表示，他太早卖掉了苹果公司，并将购买更多苹果公司，尽管不是在这个市场
text: Apple remains Berkshire Hathaway's largest holding even after the conglomerate trimmed its stake at the end of last year.
zh: 即使伯克希尔哈撒韦公司去年底减持了其股份，苹果公司仍然是伯克希尔哈撒韦公司最大的持股公司。

title: A relative offered me a $25,000 loan, but wants a lien on my house. Are they taking advantage of me?
title_zh: 一位亲戚向我提供了 25,000 美元的贷款，但想要留置我的房子。他们在利用我吗？
text: “He also wants me to downsize and move.”
zh: “他还希望我缩小规模并搬家。”

title: Healthcare stocks have become a haven for investors ditching tech
title_zh: 医疗保健股已成为投资者抛弃科技股的避风港
text: Shares of AbbVie, Eli Lilly and Johnson & Johnson were on track to hit all-time highs Friday, in the latest signal that investor appetite for the biopharmaceutical sector is back.
zh: 艾伯维（AbbVie）、礼来（Eli Lilly）和强生（Johnson & Johnson）的股价周五有望创下历史新高，这是投资者对生物制药行业兴趣回归的最新信号。

title: Germany is considering raising its retirement age to 70. Could the U.S. follow?
title_zh: 德国正在考虑将退休年龄提高到70岁。美国可以效仿吗？
text: Germany may gradually raise its retirement age to 70 by 2092 — but such a move would fix only part of Social Security’s funding gap.
zh: 德国可能会在 2092 年之前逐步将退休年龄提高到 70 岁，但此举只能解决部分社会保障资金缺口。

title: Annuities are coming to more 401(k) plans. Should workers embrace them?
title_zh: 更多 401(k) 计划将提供年金。工人们应该拥抱它们吗？
text: The Trump administration wants more annuities in your 401(k). Here is why it might be a mixed bag.
zh: 特朗普政府希望您的 401(k) 计划中包含更多年金。这就是为什么它可能是一个鱼龙混杂的情况。

title: Oil prices may have fallen ‘too far, too fast’ as Trump confirms Iran violated the cease-fire deal
title_zh: 特朗普确认伊朗违反停火协议，油价可能下跌“太多、太快”
text: Oil futures were on track to tally a third-straight weekly loss on Friday — but after President Trump confirmed Iran violated its cease-fire deal with the U.S. by attacking a ship in the Strait of Hormuz, some analysts believe prices have fallen “too far, too fast.”
zh: 周五，石油期货有望连续第三周下跌，但在特朗普总统确认伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡袭击一艘船只，违反了与美国的停火协议后，一些分析师认为油价下跌“太多、太快”。

title: This disease is more expensive than cancer and heart disease combined. And it’s only going to get worse.
title_zh: 这种疾病的治疗费用比癌症和心脏病的总和还要高。而且情况只会变得更糟。
text: “People should be alarmed. This is a health crisis. It’s also an economic crisis for families and government,”
zh: “人们应该保持警惕。这是一场健康危机。这对家庭和政府来说也是一场经济危机，”

title: AI’s most explosive hardware trades are hitting a wall. Why optical and memory stocks are falling.
title_zh: 人工智能最具爆炸性的硬件交易正在碰壁。为什么光学和内存股正在下跌。
text: AI spending has been a key engine for the market, and some investors now worry that it could stall out, one expert says.
zh: 一位专家表示，人工智能支出一直是市场的关键引擎，一些投资者现在担心它可能会停滞不前。

title: Bond yields are falling as inflation pops. The Fed’s tough talk under Warsh is helping.
title_zh: 随着通货膨胀的爆发，债券收益率正在下降。沃什领导下的美联储强硬言论正在发挥作用。
text: Kevin Warsh, the new Federal Reserve chair, is helping coax Treasury yields lower by talking tough on inflation.
zh: 新任美联储主席凯文·沃什(Kevin Warsh)正在通过对通胀的强硬言论来帮助降低美国国债收益率。

title: The housing bill’s back on track to becoming law. Here’s what it does for affordability.
title_zh: 住房法案重回成为法律的轨道。这就是它对负担能力的作用。
text: A bipartisan housing package appears once again close to becoming U.S. law, albeit with a delay after President Donald Trump canceled a signing ceremony for the legislation on Wednesday.
zh: 两党住房一揽子计划似乎再次接近成为美国法律，尽管在唐纳德·特朗普总统周三取消该法案的签字仪式后有所延迟。

title: Chinese Economy Is Booming, But Stock Markets Haven’t Recovered in 20 Years - Yahoo Finance
title_zh: 中国经济蓬勃发展，股市20年未复苏 - 雅虎财经
text: Chinese Economy Is Booming, But Stock Markets Haven’t Recovered in 20 Years Yahoo Finance
zh: 中国经济蓬勃发展，但股市20年未复苏 雅虎财经

title: ‘Tell the story well’: China pushes brokerages to shape stock market narrative - South China Morning Post
title_zh: “讲好故事”：中国推动券商塑造股市叙事 - 南华早报
text: ‘Tell the story well’: China pushes brokerages to shape stock market narrative South China Morning Post
zh: “讲好故事”：中国推动券商塑造股市叙事 南华早报

title: Trump says Iran violated ceasefire with drone attacks on Strait of Hormuz ships
title_zh: 特朗普称伊朗无人机袭击霍尔木兹海峡船只违反停火协议
text: The International Maritime Organization earlier paused efforts to evacuate ships and seafarers stranded in the Strait of Hormuz after a cargo vessel was struck.
zh: 一艘货船被击中后，国际海事组织早些时候暂停了撤离滞留在霍尔木兹海峡的船只和海员的努力。

title: Trump threatens 100% tariff on countries putting 'Digital Services Tax on American Companies'
title_zh: 特朗普威胁对“对美国公司征收数字服务税”的国家征收 100% 关税
text: "This TARIFF will supersede Trade Deals made with the Country, whether implemented, signed, or not," Trump wrote in a Truth Social post.
zh: 特朗普在《真相社会》帖子中写道：“这项关税将取代与该国达成的贸易协议，无论是否实施、签署。”

title: OpenAI limits new AI models to 'trusted partners' at request of U.S. government
title_zh: 应美国政府要求，OpenAI 将新的人工智能模型限制为“值得信赖的合作伙伴”
text: OpenAI said it previewed the new models' capabilities with the government ahead of the launch.
zh: OpenAI 表示，它在发布前与政府预览了新模型的功能。

title: Minneapolis Fed President Neel Kashkari says he expects a rate hike this year
title_zh: 明尼阿波利斯联储主席尼尔·卡什卡利表示，他预计今年将加息
text: Kashkari said he sees a hike likely this year as the economy continues to feel the hit from spiking inflation.
zh: 卡什卡利表示，由于经济继续受到通胀飙升的打击，他预计今年可能会加息。

title: Honeywell Aerospace lands an analyst endorsement ahead of its debut. This is our plan for the stock
title_zh: 霍尼韦尔航空航天公司在首次亮相之前就获得了分析师的认可。这是我们的股票计划
text: The Investing Club holds its "Morning Meeting" every weekday at 10:20 a.m. ET.
zh: 投资俱乐部在每个工作日上午 10:20（东部时间）举行“晨会”。

title: ON Semiconductor strikes $7 billion deal for Synaptics in physical AI push
title_zh: 安森美半导体与 Synaptics 达成 70 亿美元交易，推动物理人工智能发展
text: ON Semiconductor said the deal bumps up its total addressable market by $30 billion, to $243 billion by 2030.
zh: 安森美半导体表示，此次交易将使其潜在市场总额增加 300 亿美元，到 2030 年达到 2,430 亿美元。

title: Trump keeps turning Republican wins into loyalty tests — and political liabilities
title_zh: 特朗普不断将共和党的胜利变成忠诚度测试和政治责任
text: President Donald Trump’s moves on housing, FISA, Iran and Washington projects are creating new headaches for Republicans trying to show voters they can govern.
zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统在住房、外国情报监视法案、伊朗和华盛顿项目方面的举措给试图向选民展示他们可以治理的共和党人带来了新的麻烦。

title: Small cap-focused Russell 2000 becomes first U.S. benchmark to enter correction territory
title_zh: 以小盘股为主的罗素 2000 指数成为首个进入调整区间的美国基准指数
text: Small caps are especially sensitive to changes in oil prices and a slowdown in the economic cycle.
zh: 小盘股对油价变化和经济周期放缓尤其敏感。

title: Fed still expects to cut rates once this year despite spiking oil prices
title_zh: 尽管油价飙升，美联储仍预计今年降息一次
text: The central bank's so-called dot plot showed a median estimate of 3.4% for the federal funds rate, the same as at the end of last year.
zh: 央行所谓的点阵图显示，联邦基金利率的中值为3.4%，与去年年底相同。

title: Social Security says I was overpaid for 7 years. I believe it’s mistaken. Can they cut my benefits?
title_zh: 社会保障局说我多付了七年的工资。我相信这是错误的。他们可以削减我的福利吗？
text: “They say I made $43,000 in 2019, but I actually made that in 2020.”
zh: “他们说我 2019 年赚了 43,000 美元，但实际上我是 2020 年赚的。”

title: There’s a ‘Trump account’ hack that can unlock decades of wealth-building for your kid
title_zh: 有一个“特朗普账户”黑客可以为你的孩子解锁数十年的财富积累
text: “The only reason” to use these accounts is “if you’re planning to do the Roth strategy,” said one financial planner.
zh: 一位理财规划师表示，使用这些账户的“唯一原因”是“如果你打算实施罗斯策略”。

title: How Micron aims to break through the risk cycle that has spooked investors for decades
title_zh: 美光科技如何突破困扰投资者数十年的风险周期
text: Also in Weekend Reads: Medicare and GLP-1s, tech stocks and career advice.
zh: 周末还可以阅读：医疗保险和 GLP-1、科技股和职业建议。

title: Discounted bond funds, especially at scandal-hit Wamco, may offer an investment opportunity
title_zh: 折扣债券基金，尤其是丑闻缠身的 Wamco，可能会提供投资机会
text: Professional investment advisers wear handcuffs when they manage clients’ money — but you don’t.
zh: 专业投资顾问在管理客户资金时戴着手铐——但你没有。

title: Iran tightens its grip on Strait of Hormuz, sending oil prices higher
title_zh: 伊朗收紧对霍尔木兹海峡的控制，推高油价
text: Oil risks fresh shocks as Iran appears to assert control over the key waterway.
zh: 随着伊朗似乎声称控制了这条关键水道，石油面临新的冲击。

title: ‘I’m scared I made a huge financial mistake’: I gave my brother half of my $1.5 million home. Can he make me sell it?
title_zh: “我担心我犯了一个巨大的财务错误”：我把我价值 150 万美元的房子的一半给了我哥哥。他能让我卖掉吗？
text: “One lawyer estimated that my brother and I would each walk away with a couple hundred thousand dollars.”
zh: “一位律师估计我和我的兄弟每人会带走几十万美元。”

title: Trump eases pressure on Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh as inflation tops 4%
title_zh: 通胀率突破4%，特朗普缓解了对美联储主席凯文·沃什的压力
text: President Donald Trump's economic advisors are giving Warsh space, as the new Fed chairman, on interest rates as the president repeats calls to cut.
zh: 在总统再次呼吁降息之际，唐纳德·特朗普总统的经济顾问正在为新任美联储主席沃什在利率问题上给予空间。

title: OpenAI hasn't held pre-IPO investor meetings or set timeline yet, sources say
title_zh: 消息人士称，OpenAI 尚未召开 IPO 前投资者会议或设定时间表
text: OpenAI said it confidentially filed its prospectus with the SEC earlier this month, but noted it "may be a while" before it goes public.
zh: OpenAI 表示，该公司本月早些时候向 SEC 秘密提交了招股说明书，但指出“可能需要一段时间”才能上市。

title: Jeremy Grantham says this is the most expensive market in 'American history'
title_zh: 杰里米格兰瑟姆说这是“美国历史上”最昂贵的市场
text: Jeremy Grantham says soaring valuations around AI makes the U.S. stock market historically expensive.
zh: 杰里米·格兰瑟姆 (Jeremy Grantham) 表示，围绕人工智能的估值飙升，使美国股市处于历史高位。

title: ON Semi tanks 20% following Synaptics deal as CEO defends core business
title_zh: Synaptics 交易后安森美半导体股价下跌 20%，首席执行官捍卫核心业务
text: The pivot into physical AI grows On Semi's addressable market by an additional $30 billion, the company said.
zh: 该公司表示，转向物理人工智能将使 On Semi 的潜在市场额外增长 300 亿美元。

title: Ex-Trump advisor John Bolton pleads guilty to retaining national defense information
title_zh: 前特朗普顾问约翰博尔顿承认保留国防信息
text: John Bolton is one of several foes of President Donald Trump who has been indicted since Trump regained the White House.
zh: 约翰·博尔顿是唐纳德·特朗普总统的几个敌人之一，自特朗普重新入主白宫以来，他一直被起诉。

title: One factor that may be partly behind the S&P 500's curious action this week
title_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数本周奇怪走势的部分原因之一可能是
text: There were plenty of reasons for stocks to post a big move on Thursday, but the S&P 500 ended almost exactly where it closed Wednesday.
zh: 周四股市出现大幅波动的原因有很多，但标准普尔 500 指数几乎与周三收盘价完全一致。

title: Billionaire investor Jeremy Grantham says bitcoin will 'dwindle away with a whimper'
title_zh: 亿万富翁投资者杰里米·格兰瑟姆表示，比特币将“悄然消失”
text: Jeremy Grantham renewed his long-running criticism of bitcoin, predicting it will gradually fade into irrelevance over decades.
zh: 杰里米·格兰瑟姆（Jeremy Grantham）重申了他长期以来对比特币的批评，并预测比特币将在几十年内逐渐变得无关紧要。

title: OpenAI is reportedly delaying its IPO. Here's when Kalshi traders think it will announce
title_zh: 据报道，OpenAI 正在推迟 IPO。这是卡尔什交易员认为会宣布的时间
text: Speculators think the OpenAI IPO will come early next year, with only one-in-three odds it happens in 2026 but a high likelihood it is done by June 2027.
zh: 投机者认为 OpenAI IPO 将于明年初进行，2026 年发生的可能性只有三分之一，但很有可能在 2027 年 6 月完成。

title: Why breakthrough GLP-1 weight loss pills may be a bad thing for employer insurance coverage
title_zh: 为什么突破性的 GLP-1 减肥药可能对雇主保险范围来说是一件坏事
text: New GLP-1 weight-loss pills from Novo Nordisk and Eli Lilly are likely to boost consumer demand, but employer-sponsored health insurance may not foot the bill.
zh: 诺和诺德 (Novo Nordisk) 和礼来 (Eli Lilly) 的新型 GLP-1 减肥药可能会提振消费者需求，但雇主赞助的健康保险可能无法支付费用。

title: Chicago Fed President Goolsbee says inflation is too high; Williams sees price pressures easing
title_zh: 芝加哥联储主席古尔斯比表示通胀过高；威廉姆斯认为价格压力有所缓解
text: In a live CNBC interview from his home district, Goolsbee declined to speculate on where he thinks interest rates are headed.
zh: 在他的家乡接受 CNBC 现场采访时，古尔斯比拒绝猜测他认为利率的走向。
